creator: bwithrow@BayNetworks.com
text:
j@uriah.heep.sax.de said:
:- You should have included your patches into your PR, so that anybody
:- with some spare 10 minutes could have a look at them.  Without this,
:- the probability that it will ever be fixed drops drastically.

You're right.  I can only plead that ANS wasn't routing between home
(where I sent the pr) and work (where the patchew were).  Anyway,
here are the patches sent to me by ``Doug Rabson <dfr@render.com>''.
These are against 2.1.[56] and are in use here on several machines.
